summary: Production Matching Diagnostics & Freight/BOL Resolver feature fully tested. All 13 backend tests pass. Frontend Matching Debug Panel verified on Document Detail page with all sections: strategy, outcome badges, freight carrier badge, processing time, extraction table, normalization trace, cache/API results, score breakdown with 8 components, and decision section. Cache metrics show 278K records across 5 entity types. BC write guard confirmed BLOCKED (read-only).
critical_code_review_comments: Freight strategy detection working - Tumalo Creek Transportation triggers Freight_Invoice strategy

Score breakdown includes all 8 components: exact_reference_match, entity_type_alignment, domain_alignment, vendor_alignment, candidate_confidence, vendor_behavior_bonus, freight_vendor_boost, shipment_relationship
Ambiguity threshold correctly implemented: best>=0.90 AND second<0.70=exact_match; best>=0.70=likely_match
Normalization trace shows step-by-step: input → strip_punctuation → strip_leading_zeros
Cache hit rate at 100% for tested resolutions - cache performing well
seed_data_creation: None - used existing documents: 98695c83-a7f3-495f-ac8d-bb5405c55a63 and 359c4112-ff06-4f1a-ba07-f761a2b26f8a (Tumalo Creek freight invoice)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Matching Diagnostics feature complete. Key endpoints: GET /api/documents/{id}/matching-debug (returns diagnostics), POST /api/documents/{id}/matching-debug/rerun (reruns with full capture), GET /api/cache/metrics (278K records, 5 entity types). Frontend MatchingDebugPanel is collapsible on Document Detail page with toggle button. Shows: Strategy (Freight_Invoice for freight carriers), outcome badge (Likely/Exact/Ambiguous), Freight Carrier badge, processing time, extraction table (Raw/Normalized/Label/Domain/Conf), normalization trace, cache/API results, score breakdown with visual bars, decision section. Tumalo Creek doc 359c4112 scores 0.745 as 'likely_match' for Posted Sales Shipment 111428.

GET /api/documents/{id}/matching-debug.evidence: Returns document_id, document_type, vendor, is_freight_carrier, match_outcome, diagnostics object with extraction, normalization, candidates, candidate_scores, decision

POST /api/documents/{id}/matching-debug/.evidence: Reruns resolution with full diagnostics capture. Doc 359c4112 returns resolver_strategy=Freight_Invoice, match_outcome=likely_match, matching_diagnostics with all fields

Diagnostics: extraction info.evidence: Shows from_fields, from_document, from_text counts, unique_count. Tumalo Creek shows 3 candidates extracted

Diagnostics: normalization trace.evidence: Shows step-by-step: input=0303853 → strip_leading_zeros=303853. Also shows strip_punctuation for compound refs

Diagnostics: cache_results & bc_fallback.evidence: cache_results shows reference=111428 → entity=posted_sales_shipment, doc_no=111428. bc_fallback_results empty (cache hit)

Diagnostics: candidate_scores with score.evidence: Score breakdown shows: exact_reference_match=0.40, entity_type_alignment=0.10, candidate_confidence=0.10, freight_vendor_boost=0.15 = final_score=0.745

Diagnostics: decision section.evidence: Shows outcome=likely_match, best_score=0.745, second_best_score=0, best_entity=posted_sales_shipment, best_doc_no=111428

GET /api/cache/metrics.evidence: Returns total_records=278092, records_by_entity_type (127K shipments, 89K purchase invoices, 58K sales invoices, 1.5K POs, 1.2K SOs), resolution_metrics with cache_hit_rate=1.0

Freight strategy detection.evidence: Tumalo Creek Transportation triggers Freight_Invoice strategy (not default AP_Invoice). Strategy reason includes 'Freight carrier: TUMALOC'

Freight vendor boost scoring.evidence: Score breakdown shows freight_vendor_boost=0.15 for shipment entities when vendor is freight carrier

GET /api/bc/write-guard/status.evidence: Returns write_enabled=false, status=blocked, message='BC writes are BLOCKED (production safety)'

Frontend: Matching Debug Panel toggle.evidence: data-testid='matching-debug-toggle' expands/collapses panel. Shows Bug icon + 'Matching Debug' text

Frontend: Strategy and outcome badges.evidence: Shows 'Strategy: Freight_Invoice → Likely' with blue Likely badge and purple 'Freight Carrier' badge

Frontend: Extraction table.evidence: Table with Raw/Normalized/Label/Domain/Conf columns. Shows candidates like 111428 (PO, purchase, 95%), 111428PU089268460 (BOL, shipping, 95%), 0303853 (INVOICE, purchase, 90%)

Frontend: Normalization Trace expandable.evidence: data-testid='matching-debug-norm-toggle' shows trace steps: input → strip_punctuation → strip_leading_zeros

Frontend: Cache/API Results section.evidence: data-testid='matching-debug-cache-toggle' shows Cache badge with 111428 → posted_sales_shipment: 111428

Frontend: Score Breakdown section.evidence: data-testid='matching-debug-scores-toggle' shows visual bars for each score component with percentages

Frontend: Decision section.evidence: data-testid='matching-debug-decision' shows Outcome: likely_match badge, Best: 74.5% posted_sales_shipment: 111428

Frontend: Re-run button.evidence: data-testid='matching-debug-rerun' triggers resolution rerun. Toast confirms 'Resolution re-run with diagnostics'

Ambiguity threshold logic.evidence: Doc 359c4112 with best_score=0.745 and second_best_score=0 correctly returns likely_match (meets >=0.70 with no strong competitors)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - cache reads from MongoDB bc_reference_cache collection, BC write guard confirms production read-only mode
